_comment: Sample-dataset catalog for the Studio. Bundled defaults; users can EXTEND this by pointing VECTORS_STUDIO_DATASETS at their own JSON file (same schema) — its entries are merged over these by id. Each entry loads via the HuggingFace datasets-server /rows API (the dataset must have the HF dataset viewer enabled). vectorColumn must be a numeric-array column; textColumn/idColumn are optional. metric is one of COSINE/EUCLIDEAN/DOT_PRODUCT/MAXIMUM_INNER_PRODUCT.

datasets.name: DBpedia · OpenAI ada-002
datasets.description: 1M Wikipedia entities (title + text), embedded with OpenAI text-embedding-ada-002. The canonical vector-search benchmark corpus.

datasets.name: DBpedia · OpenAI 3-small
datasets.description: DBpedia entities embedded with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small (100K subset).

datasets.name: DBpedia · OpenAI 3-large (1536)
datasets.description: DBpedia entities embedded with OpenAI text-embedding-3-large at 1536 dims.

datasets.name: DBpedia · OpenAI 3-large (3072)
datasets.description: DBpedia entities embedded with OpenAI text-embedding-3-large at full 3072 dims — a high-dimensional stress case.

datasets.name: DBpedia · ada-002 (same corpus as 3-large)
datasets.description: The same DBpedia corpus as 'DBpedia · OpenAI 3-large' but the ada-002 column — load both to SEE how the embedding model changes the clustering in the projector.

datasets.name: arXiv titles · InstructorXL
datasets.description: arXiv paper titles embedded with hkunlp/instructor-xl (768 dims). Dense scientific-domain clusters.
datasets.queryPrefix: Represent the Science title for retrieving relevant documents:

datasets.name: arXiv abstracts · InstructorXL
datasets.description: arXiv paper abstracts embedded with hkunlp/instructor-xl (768 dims). Longer text than titles — good MMR demo.
datasets.queryPrefix: Represent the Science abstract for retrieving relevant documents:

datasets.name: Wikipedia (2023-11) · mxbai-embed-large
datasets.description: English Wikipedia passages embedded with mixedbread-ai/mxbai-embed-large-v1 (1024 dims).
datasets.queryPrefix: Represent this sentence for searching relevant passages:
